title: tf.strided_slice  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Extracts a strided slice of a tensor (generalized Python array indexing).
Compat aliases for migrationSeeMigration guidefor
more details.tf.compat.v1.strided_slice

parameters.name: tensor[..., 3:4:-1, tf.newaxis, 3]
parameters.description:
Instead of calling this op directly most users will want to use the
NumPy-style slicing syntax (e.g.), which
is supported viatf.Tensor.getitemandtf.Variable.getitem.

parameters.name: (end-begin)/stride
parameters.description:

not les

parameters.name: foo[5:,:,:3]
